Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class ProofTreeDelta

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.ProofTreeDelta
All Implemented Interfaces:
IProofTreeDelta
public class ProofTreeDelta extends Object implements IProofTreeDelta
Implementation of proof tree deltas.

    • ProofTreeDelta

      public ProofTreeDelta(IProofTreeNode node)
      Creates a delta for the given node.
      Parameters:
      node - node of a proof tree which has changed.

  • Method Details

    • addChild

      public ProofTreeDelta addChild(IProofTreeNode childNode)

    • getChildren

      public IProofTreeDelta[] getChildren()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeDelta
      Returns deltas for the children which have changed.

      Note that this method returns an empty array if this delta has flag CHILDREN or CONTENTS set.

      Specified by:
      getChildren in interface IProofTreeDelta
      Returns:
      deltas for the children which have changed

    • getFlags

      public int getFlags()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeDelta
      Returns the flags of this delta: a combination of STATUS and CHILDREN.
      Specified by:
      getFlags in interface IProofTreeDelta
      Returns:
      the flags of this delta
